case_title: MAYTA & JENSEN GENERAL CONTRACTORS VS. 322 6TH ST HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAGID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. (DEFT. HAVE NOT BEEN SERVED). REQUEST FOR A NEW COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYTA & JENSEN GENERAL CONTRACTORS
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-27-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-22-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYTA & JENSEN GENERAL CONTRACTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 322 6TH ST HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION $4,266.00 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,329.00, COURT FINDS THAT HOA IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE WORK AUTHORIZED BY THIER AGENT, WAHL & CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
